ham.subject: April 2026 Marketing Highlights – New Deals Inside!
ham.body:
Hi there,

We hope you’re having a great week. Here’s what’s new at our store this month:

• 25% off on all kitchen appliances – use code KITCHEN25 at checkout.
• Free shipping on orders over ₹2000.
• New product launch: Smart Home Hub – control your lights, thermostat, and security camera from one app.

Check out the full list and grab these offers before they expire. <URL>

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Warning: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in 3 days. To avoid interruption in your services, you must verify your credentials within the next 24 hours.

Please click on the link below and login to confirm your password. <URL>

Failure to act will result in your account being temporarily locked. If you have already updated your password, please ignore this message.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Microsoft Support Team
